recommendations.title: Detachment

recommendations.title: Hardcore Henry

recommendations.title: A Man for All Seasons
recommendations.overview: A depiction of the conflict between King Henry VIII of England and his Lord Chancellor, Sir Thomas More, who refuses to swear the Oath of Supremacy declaring Henry Supreme Head of the Church in England.

recommendations.title: Big

recommendations.title: Henry Danger: The Movie

recommendations.title: Rye Lane
recommendations.overview: Two twenty-somethings, both reeling from bad break-ups, connect over the course of an eventful day in South London – helping each other deal with their nightmare exes, and potentially restoring their faith in romance.

recommendations.title: Becket
recommendations.overview: Thomas Becket, Henry II's longtime advisor, finds his friendship with the debauched king corroding when he is unwillingly appointed as Archbishop of Canterbury in an attempt to gain absolute loyalty from the Church.

recommendations.title: Rookie of the Year

recommendations.title: The Bishop's Wife
